item.dc:creator: Jennifer Jett
item.description: The U.S. military said it carried out what it called self-defense strikes on Iranian radar and drone control sites over the weekend, while Iran said it targeted an air base used in the U.S. attack as the two countries continued to trade strikes amid talks to end their war.U.S.

media:content.media:text: A satellite view of Qeshm Island in Hormozgan Province, Iran, within the Strait of Hormuz region on January 17, 2026.
media:content.media:description: A satellite view of Qeshm Island in Hormozgan Province, Iran. The island was one of two targets of a U.S. military attack.

item.title: U.S. says it struck Iranian drone and radar sites, as Iran claims attack on air base

item.dc:creator: Abigail Williams
item.description: Hundreds of diplomats have been forced to retire or were laid off in the Trump administration

media:content.media:text: Dozens of senior career foreign service officers have left the State Department since Trump took office.
media:content.media:description: Dozens of senior career foreign service officers have left the State Department since Trump took office.

media:content.media:text: Kelly Adams-Smith.
media:content.media:description: Dozens of senior career foreign service officers have left the State Department since Trump took office.

media:content.media:text: U.S. Department of State.
media:content.media:description: Dozens of senior career foreign service officers have left the State Department since Trump took office.

media:content.media:text: Health workers in gear.
media:content.media:description: Dozens of senior career foreign service officers have left the State Department since Trump took office.

media:content.media:text: Rubio Briefing 5/5/26
media:content.media:description: Dozens of senior career foreign service officers have left the State Department since Trump took office.

media:content.media:text: President Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner and the U.S. special envoy to the Middle East, Steve Witkoff, in Islamabad on April 12.
media:content.media:description: Dozens of senior career foreign service officers have left the State Department since Trump took office.

item.title: Massive leadership vacuum weakens U.S. diplomacy in the face of global crises

item.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Gov. Andy Beshear (D-Ky.) expresses his support for State Sen. James Talarico (D-Texas) who will face off with Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton for the Senate in November.

media:content.media:title: Andy Beshear says ‘Texas is in play’ for Democrats after Paxton nomination: Full interview
media:content.media:description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Gov. Andy Beshear (D-Ky.) expresses his support for State Sen. James Talarico (D-Texas) who will face off with Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton for the Senate in November.

item.title: Andy Beshear says ‘Texas is in play’ for Democrats after Paxton nomination: Full interview

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
Julie Tsirkin
item.description: The wife of Graham Platner, the presumptive Democratic nominee for the Senate in Maine, said she is “really angry” about reports that she previously told her husband’s campaign he had exchanged sexually explicit texts with other women.“It makes me really angry, disappointed,” Platner’s wife, Amy Gertner, said in a direct-to-camera video Platner’s campaign released Saturday night.

media:content.media:text: Graham Platner speaks
media:content.media:description: Graham Platner, a Maine Democrat and U.S. Senate candidate, during an interview in York, Maine, on April 17, 2026.

item.title: Graham Platner’s wife ‘angry’ her disclosures of his extramarital sexting were made public

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: Former Vice President Mike Pence said the second administration of President Donald Trump has “departed” from traditional conservative principles in the president’s second term.

media:content.media:text: Mike Pence at the Pray Vote Stand Summit in Washington, D.C.,
media:content.media:description: Mike Pence at the Pray Vote Stand Summit in Washington, D.C., on Sept. 15, 2023.

item.title: Mike Pence says the Trump administration has ‘departed’ from conservative principles

item.description: A new study on a groundbreaking pancreatic cancer drug finds that it has the potential to double survival rates for more than 90 percent of patients. Researchers are now exploring whether the drug, called daraxonrasib, could also be effective in lung, ovarian, and colorectal cancers. NBC News’ Erika Edwards reports.

media:content.media:title: Breakthrough pancreatic cancer treatment could double survival time
media:content.media:description: A new study on a groundbreaking pancreatic cancer drug finds that it has the potential to double survival rates for more than 90 percent of patients. Researchers are now exploring whether the drug, called daraxonrasib, could also be effective in lung, ovarian, and colorectal cancers. NBC News’ Erika Edwards reports.

item.title: Breakthrough pancreatic cancer treatment could double survival time

item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: Colombia’s outgoing president sowed doubt Sunday about his country’s elections, which showed his preferred candidate, Iván Cepeda, headed to a runoff next month against right-wing opponent Abelardo de la Espriella

media:content.media:text: Five election officials sorting paper ballots on a folding table.
media:content.media:description: Poll workers count ballots during the presidential election in Sabaneta, Colombia, on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Ivan Cepeda standing at an array of microphones with aides and bodyguards surrounding him.
media:content.media:description: Poll workers count ballots during the presidential election in Sabaneta, Colombia, on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Abelardo de la Espriella speaks behind a wall of bulletproof glass, wearing a yellow soccer-style jersey and a blue baseball cap.
media:content.media:description: Poll workers count ballots during the presidential election in Sabaneta, Colombia, on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Hundreds of people in a gymnasium surrounding cardboard voting booths.
media:content.media:description: Poll workers count ballots during the presidential election in Sabaneta, Colombia, on Saturday.

item.title: Colombia’s Petro sows doubt about election as favored successor heads to runoff against pro-Trump rival

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero
item.description: A body pulled from a Washington state river has been identified as that of “Alaskan Bush People” cast member Matt Brown

media:content.media:text: A selfie of Matt Brown with a knitted cap and a hood pulled up.
media:content.media:description: Matt Brown, known for appearing on the Discovery Channel reality series "Alaskan Bush People," was found dead in the Okanogan River in Washington state Saturday.

item.title: Body of ‘Alaskan Bush People’ star Matt Brown found in Washington state river

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: Jennifer Jett
item.description: The U.S. military said it carried out what it called self-defense strikes on Iranian radar and drone control sites over the weekend, while Iran said it targeted an air base used in the U.S. attack as the two countries continued to trade strikes amid talks to end their war.U.S.

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero

media:content.media:text: Five election officials sorting paper ballots on a folding table.

media:content.media:text: Ivan Cepeda standing at an array of microphones with aides and bodyguards surrounding him.

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero
item.description: Human remains found by a hiker last week in a New Mexico national forest are those of a Los Alamos National Laboratory employee who had been missing for nearly a year, authorities said

media:content.media:text: Melissa Casias
media:content.media:description: Melissa Casias

media:content.media:text: Melissa Casias was reported missing in June. Authorities said her remains were found in a New Mexico national forest Thursday.
media:content.media:description: Melissa Casias

item.title: Remains found in New Mexico national forest ID’d as woman who vanished last year

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
item.description: Jacob Daniel Baker, a Hawaii man arrested last week following a manhunt, has been charged with murder in connection with the killings of three men on the Big Island, police announced.

media:content.media:text: A still showing Jake Baker on property in Kaimu, Hawaii.
media:content.media:description: A still showing Jake Baker on property in Kaimu, Hawaii.

media:content.media:text: Robert Shine was found dead at a residence on Papaya Farms Road in Pāhoa, Hawaii.
media:content.media:description: Robert Shine was found dead at a residence on Papaya Farms Road in Pāhoa, Hawaii.

item.title: Suspect in the killings of 3 men in Hawaii is charged with murder

item.dc:creator: Angela Yang
item.description: A “Love Island USA” cast member has once again been booted from the villa.

media:content.media:text: Vasana Montgomery in a black bathing suit
media:content.media:description: Vasana Montgomery.

media:content.media:text: Vasana Montgomery in a black bathing suit
media:content.media:description: Vasana Montgomery.

media:content.media:text: A large two-story white villa with a huge inground pool.
media:content.media:description: Vasana Montgomery.

item.title: ‘Love Island USA’ boots Season 8 contestant after alleged use of racial slur circulates online

item.dc:creator: Amina Kilpatrick
Kayla Hayempour
Mark Hodge
item.description: Family visitation at a New Jersey immigration detention center is set to resume after being suspended amid days of protests, arrests and clashes outside the facility.

media:content.media:text: Detainees stand by a window inside the federal immigration center.
media:content.media:description: Detainees stand by a window inside the federal immigration center at Delaney Hall in Newark, where ICE is housing detained immigrants on May 26, 2026 in Newark, N.J.

media:content.media:text: An Israeli flag flies over the medieval Beaufort Castle as seen from the Marjayoun area of southern Lebanon on Sunday.
media:content.media:description: An Israeli flag flies over the medieval Beaufort Castle as seen from the Marjayoun area of southern Lebanon on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: A three way split composite image of Kane Parsons, left, Curry Barker, and Markiplier.
media:content.media:description: Kane Parsons; Curry Barker; Markiplier.

media:content.media:text: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs dribbles the ball during the game against the Oklahoma City Thunder during Game Seven of the NBA Western Conference Finals on May 30, 2026 at Paycom Center in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma.
media:content.media:description: San Antonio Spurs star Victor Wembanyama drives the lane against the Oklahoma City Thunder during Game 7 of the Western Conference finals.

item.title: Here’s the biggest news you missed this weekend

item.dc:creator: Cristian Santana
Adam Reiss
item.description: Family visitation at a New Jersey immigration detention center is set to resume after being suspended amid days of protests, arrests and clashes outside the facility, Gov.

media:content.media:text: Police clash with protesters outside the federal immigration center at Delaney Hall
media:content.media:description: Police clash with protesters outside the federal immigration center at Delaney Hall, in Newark, N.J., on May 30, 2026.

item.title: Family visitation resumes at New Jersey ICE detention center after days of protests

item.dc:creator: Francie Ebert
item.description: Honda is recalling nearly 100,000 vehicles due to airbag complications, according to the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration.

media:content.media:text: The logo of the Honda Motor Company is displayed outside a dealership

item.title: Nearly 100,000 Honda vehicles recalled over airbag issues

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Molly Hunter
item.description: Over 40 people have died in a growing Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda, where government and international aid organizations are struggling to cope with the spread of the disease

media:content.media:text: Workers wearing PPE lower a casket into a dug out grave outside
media:content.media:description: Red Cross workers carry a coffin with the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola, during his burial at the Nyamurongo cemetery in Ituri province, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.

item.title: More than 40 dead in Ebola outbreak in DR Congo and Uganda

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear said Sunday that “Texas is in play” for Democrats in this year’s Senate race after state Attorney General Ken Paxton beat Sen. John Cornyn.

media:content.media:text: Andy Beshear.
media:content.media:description: Andy Beshear in Chicago on Aug. 19, 2024.

item.title: Andy Beshear says ‘Texas is in play’ for Democrats after Ken Paxton’s Senate GOP primary win

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
Julie Tsirkin
item.description: The wife of Graham Platner, the presumptive Democratic nominee for the Senate in Maine, said she is “really angry” about reports that she previously told her husband’s campaign he had exchanged sexually explicit texts with other women.“It makes me really angry, disappointed,” Platner’s wife, Amy Gertner, said in a direct-to-camera video Platner’s campaign released Saturday night.

media:content.media:text: Graham Platner speaks
media:content.media:description: Graham Platner, a Maine Democrat and U.S. Senate candidate, during an interview in York, Maine, on April 17, 2026.

item.title: Graham Platner’s wife ‘angry’ her disclosures of his extramarital sexting were made public

item.dc:creator: Lauren Wilson
item.description: A24’s “Backrooms” — from 20-year-old Kane Parsons — broke box office records this weekend, the latest example of an indie horror hit helmed by a YouTuber.

media:content.media:text: A three way split composite image of Kane Parsons, left, Curry Barker, and Markiplier.
media:content.media:description: Curry Barker; Kane Parsons; Markiplier.

media:content.media:text: Renate Reinsve stands in front of a wall with a rectangle drawn in blue lines, and her shadow is cast next to her on the wall
media:content.media:description: Curry Barker; Kane Parsons; Markiplier.

item.title: Meet Hollywood’s new masters of horror: YouTubers

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez

media:content.media:description: Mike Pence at the Pray Vote Stand Summit in Washington, D.C., on Sept. 15, 2023.

item.title: Mike Pence says the Trump administration has ‘departed’ from conservative principles

item.dc:creator: Bianca Alvarez
item.description: Bar soaps work as effectively as body washes and I rounded up editor-approved picks from Dove, L’Occitane, Avène and more.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

item.title: Bar soaps vs. body wash — which is best for your skin?

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
Cory Fernandez
Bethany Heitman
item.description: I found the best methods and products for cleaning glasses, including reading glasses, sunglasses and more. Optometrists recommend the best cleaning products.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

item.title: This is how you should actually be cleaning your glasses
